title: clinopodium micranthum var. yakusimense
intro: Clinopodium micranthum var. yakusimense is a variety of the Clinopodium micranthum plant, a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Japanese and Korean folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Clinopodium micranthum var. yakusimense include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Clinopodium micranthum var. yakusimense is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
